expectations.text: Names a primary metric tied to the goal (CAC or ROAS)
expectations.evidence: The response recommends 'picking one primary goal metric (usually CAC or ROAS)' and defines both in the Revenue/Business Metrics section.

expectations.text: Includes leading indicators (CTR, CPC, conversion rate)
expectations.evidence: CTR, CPC, and Conversion Rate are listed with definitions in the Efficiency and Conversion Metrics sections and in the weekly check schedule.
Formulas are shown inline for CTR (clicks ÷ impressions), CAC (total spend ÷ new customers acquired), and ROAS (revenue generated ÷ ad spend).

expectations.text: Warns against vanity metrics such as impressions
expectations.evidence: Impressions and CPM are listed as valid metrics with no warning about their vanity metric status.
The Attribution Setup section explicitly calls last-click attribution 'common but imperfect,' acknowledging the limitation.
